rationale: Ser Lyn wields Lady Forlorn, the ancestral Valyrian steel sword of House Corbray
Cut down the previously-wounded Prince Lewyn Martell of the Kingsguard at the Battle of the Trident
Petyr Baelish admits to Sansa Stark that Lyn Corbray is in his employ
Mychel Redfort serves as Lyn's squire; knight-squire training relationship
Fought for House Targaryen alongside Lord Marq Grafton against Lord Jon Arryn at the gates of Gulltown during Robert's Rebellion
One of Lady Lysa Arryn's suitors after the death of Lord Jon Arryn
